overall.description: A third-person gameplay sequence from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing the protagonist walking through a rainy, gas-lit historic district at night. The character moves along wet cobblestone streets past iron-fenced mansions and parked horse-drawn carriages, approaching a large intersection with multi-story buildings.

scene_state.functional_zone: historic residential street with iron fences

agents.ego_description: walking steadily down the wet street past cast iron fences and historic mansions with gas lamps

entered.detail: black wrought iron fence with stone pillars running along the left sidewalk
two-story stone building with columns and balconies, warm light in windows
tall cast iron lamp post with warm yellow glow illuminating the mist
large oak tree draped with Spanish moss lining the right side of the street

segments.scene_description: The character walks down a narrow, rain-soaked residential street at night. Cast iron fences line the left side in front of historic mansions, while Spanish moss-draped trees stand on the right. Gas lamps cast a warm, hazy glow through the light rain.

events.description: red horse-drawn carriage comes into view parked on the right side of the street

agents.ego_description: continuing down the street, approaching and passing a parked red carriage on the right

entered.detail: wooden carriage with red upholstered seating parked on the muddy shoulder

segments.scene_description: As the character progresses, a red horse-drawn carriage appears parked on the right. The historic mansion recedes behind as the street continues, with gas lamps growing closer and the moss-draped trees shifting in perspective.

events.description: dark horse-drawn carriage becomes visible parked on the left side ahead
street begins to widen as character approaches an intersection with larger buildings visible ahead

agents.ego_description: walking past a second parked carriage on the left, approaching an open intersection with multi-story buildings

entered.detail: dark wooden carriage with covered top parked on the left side of the road
large multi-story stone building with ornate balconies at the upcoming intersection

segments.scene_description: The character passes a dark carriage parked on the left as the red carriage disappears behind. The street gradually widens, revealing a large corner building ahead at the intersection, while the iron fence continues to recede on the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: historic urban intersection with multi-story buildings

events.description: entering a more brightly lit intersection with multiple gas lamps illuminating the open area

agents.ego_description: walking into the open cobblestone intersection, surrounded by historic buildings with warm glowing windows

entered.detail: three-story stone building with arched windows and iron balconies lining the right side
reflective cobblestone street surface glistening with rain water

segments.scene_description: The character emerges into a wide, open intersection with cobblestone paving. The corner building looms large ahead, while additional historic buildings line the right side. Multiple gas lamps create a warm, atmospheric glow in the rainy night, and the iron fences and carriages of the previous street are left behind.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a narrow, rain-soaked residential street that gradually opens into a wide, gas-lit urban intersection. It begins by trailing the character past cast iron fences and historic mansions, with Spanish moss-draped trees and hazy gas lamps framing the wet road. As the character progresses, the perspective shifts past a parked red horse-drawn carriage before passing a second dark carriage on the opposite side. The street then gradually widens, causing the residential fences to recede as a large corner building emerges ahead. Finally, the camera emerges into a broad cobblestone intersection where multiple gas lamps cast a warm, atmospheric glow against the surrounding multi-story buildings.
